svg.text: Decision algorithm: classifying a completed superiority RCT

g.text: For ALL results: check power calculation, conduct quality, assay sensitivity
Never compute post-hoc power. If available, compute Bayesian posteriors.

svg.text: Underpowered applies to ANY result (p<0.05 or p>0.05)
Wide CI + missed enrollment targets = unreliable regardless of classification
Sources: Pocock & Stone NEJM 2016 | Hawkins & Samuels JAMA 2021 | Harrell | ICH E9/E10
